extra-numerary-chromosomes.help: Method or decision fields used for identifying or assigning microchromosomes (Such as B Chromosomes), where relevant.

tool.help: Tool or workflow used for microchromosome identification or assignment, for example MicroFinder.

comparator.help: Comparator species, assembly or reference used for organelle assembly, where applicable.

decision_notes.help: Short note on microchromosome assignment choices or review decisions.

naming_method.help: How chromosome names or numbers were assigned during curation.

synteny_source.help: Comparator assembly, species or reference source used when chromosomes were named by synteny.

comparator.help: Comparator species, assembly or reference used for organelle assembly, where applicable.

autosome_count.help: Number of autosomes recorded by curation.

chromosome_result.help: Curation chromosome assignment summary from the curation/JIRA record. data_note may parse jira_perc_assem from this text, but that value is not used for the published percentage of assembly assigned to chromosomes.

observed_sex.help: Observed or recorded sex of the specimen used for assembly, where curated.

sex_chromosome_complement.help: Curated sex chromosome complement, for example XX, XY, ZZ, ZW or Z0.

source: Tree of Sex Database (in the future)
identified_sex_chromosomes.help: Sex chromosome labels identified in the assembly and reported in the genome note, for example X, X and Y, W and Z, or Z.

comparator.help: Comparator species, assembly or reference used for organelle assembly, where applicable.

assembly_type.help: Assembly type recorded in the curation/JIRA record, for example Full VGP.

curator_note.help: Free-text curator note from the curation/JIRA record, including chromosome assignment rationale or assembly caveats.

curation_evidence.help: Evidence or data types used during curation, for example Hi-C contact maps and JBrowse.

manual_interventions_per_gb.$comment: KvN: I don't currently use this, but it could be useful for the overall project.
manual_interventions_per_gb.help: Manual interventions in the assembly, normalised per Giga-base

haplotypic_duplications_removed.help: Manual removals of haplotypic duplications during curation; used with breaks and joins to derive the curation intervention sentence.

manual_inversions.help: Manual inversions recorded in the curation/JIRA record. data_note pulls this field in.

change_in_length_bp.$comment: KvN: Fetch this in bp, but report as a percentage.
change_in_length_bp.help: Change in the length of the assembly, can be positive or negative. Recorded in base pairs.

change_in_length_percent.help: Percentage change in total assembly length after curation; used in the derived curation intervention sentence.

change_in_scaffold_count_percent.help: Percentage change in scaffold count after curation; used in the derived curation intervention sentence.

change_in_n50.$comment: KvN: Fetch this in bp, but report as a percentage.
change_in_n50.help: Change in the scaffold N50 metric, recorded in base-pairs.

change_in_n50_percent.help: Percentage change in scaffold N50 after curation; used in the derived curation intervention sentence.

manual_interventions_sentence.$comment: KvN: In data_note this publication text is derived from intervention counts and percentage changes by the template, rather than entered as a raw pipeline field.
manual_interventions_sentence.help: Publication-ready sentences describing manual curation interventions and their effect on scaffold count, scaffold N50 and assembly length.

scaffolds_removed.help: Number of scaffolds marked as contaminant and removed from the assembly

percentage_scaffolds_removed.help: Percentage of scaffolds marked as contaminant and removed from the assembly

largest_scaffold_removed.help: Length of the largest scaffold removed from the assembly

percentage_largest_scaffold_removed.help: Percentage of the assembly that the largest scaffold removed accounted for

total_length_of_scaffolds_removed.help: Total length of scaffolds removed, recorded in base-pairs
